name: ember-2-legacy
description: EmberJS 2.x (Aug 2015 – 2.18 LTS Dec 2017) — classic component model, Ember.Object.extend, computed properties, mixins, two-way bindings, classic test API. Use when working in a frozen 2.x codebase, when explaining classic patterns, or when planning a 2 → 3 upgrade. Includes a 2.18 → 3.28 migration skill.
